error[E0277]: `main` has invalid return type `i32`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o-mini/preprocessing_directives/scope_of_macro_2/sample_001/target.rs:5:14

5 | fn main() -> i32 {
  |              ^^^ `main` can only return types that implement `Termination`
  |

  |         |
  |         help: remove this `mut`
  |
